# 🌙 LunaBall Starlight
### 🌌 SMP-Focused Cobblemon & Survival+ Modpack

LunaBall Starlight is a multiplayer-first Cobblemon and Survival+ modpack built specifically for the LunaBall SMP server.

This modpack is designed around long-term multiplayer progression, structured Pokémon challenges, immersive survival systems, and balanced server economies. Every system is implemented with SMP longevity, fairness, and stability in mind.

While playable in singleplayer, LunaBall Starlight is fundamentally built for community-driven survival worlds.

---

## 🚧 Server in Development

LunaBall Starlight powers the LunaBall SMP server, which is currently under active development.

- Systems and balance may evolve over time  
- Features are continuously refined for multiplayer stability  
- Updates are released alongside server development  

This modpack is part of a growing SMP ecosystem.

---

## ⭐ Built for Multiplayer Progression

LunaBall Starlight is created for Cobblemon players who want structured goals within a persistent multiplayer world.

Instead of offering a casual survival setup, the modpack delivers:

- Clear Gym Leader and Trainer progression  
- Advanced battle mechanics including Mega Evolution, Dynamax, and Terastalization   

The goal is simple: create a Cobblemon SMP environment where progression matters and achievements feel earned.

---

## ✨ Core SMP Features

### 🟣 Cobblemon Integration
- Full Cobblemon support with all available Pokémon generations  
- Raid Den functionality  
- Refined battle mechanics and improved visual consistency  
- Multiplayer-friendly configuration and balance  

---

### 🏆 Structured Gym & Trainer System
- Designed progression through Gym Leaders  
- Trainer encounters integrated into long-term SMP gameplay  
- Balanced difficulty scaling for persistent worlds  

---

### 💎 Server Economy & Trading
- Integrated CobbleDollars economy  
- Carefully tuned shop balance  
- Survival-based resource value system  
- Multiplayer trading focus  

---

### 🍷 Immersion & Roleplay Systems
- Craftable wine and beer  
- Expanded food and cooking mechanics  
- Survival systems that enhance world realism  
- Roleplay-friendly features for community storytelling  

These systems encourage social hubs, player towns, and community interaction.

---

### ⚙️ Performance & Stability

Optimized specifically for multiplayer environments using:

- Sodium  
- Lithium  
- FerriteCore  
- Entity Culling  
- Additional rendering and memory optimizations  

The result is stable performance, smooth chunk loading, and consistent FPS in populated SMP worlds.

---

### 🧰 Quality of Life

- Enchantment-based vein mining  
- Improved UI clarity  
- Enhanced tooltips and player feedback  
- Faster navigation and menu interaction  

All improvements maintain gameplay challenge while reducing unnecessary friction.

---

## 🎉 Project Information

LunaBall Starlight is developed and maintained by Onnoembare.

It is part of the LunaBall SMP project and will continue evolving alongside the server. The focus remains on multiplayer balance, immersive survival progression, and long-term community play.

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome.
